title: The Road to Sabaody: Key Exchange

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This ship can't dive or anything.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: That's where the fishman island is!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: It's directly under the Holy Land, MarieJoa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Is the island making those bubbles!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yup, they come up from the island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Let me interject for a moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Is the log pose all right?
